aggregation_method: COUNT DISTINCT rows grouped by file_id
allowed_interpretation: Reports how many derived rows exist per file after cleaning and derivation.
forbidden_interpretation: Phase behavior; sample homogeneity; comparison across modules.

aggregation_method: COUNT rows grouped by file_id and segment_id where segment_id finite
allowed_interpretation: Reports segment-wise row coverage for annotated ramps.
forbidden_interpretation: Correctness of segment physics; implied ZFC/FCW identity beyond coverage.

aggregation_method: MIN of T_K over scope (file or segment per implementation contract)
allowed_interpretation: Extremal temperature reached in the aggregated scope.
forbidden_interpretation: Equilibrium temperature accuracy without calibration audit.

aggregation_method: MAX of T_K over scope
allowed_interpretation: Extremal temperature reached in the aggregated scope.
forbidden_interpretation: Same as mt_T_min_K_per_scope forbidden list.

aggregation_method: MAX(T_K)-MIN(T_K) over scope
allowed_interpretation: Temperature span covered by points in the scope.
forbidden_interpretation: Thermal protocol completeness versus thermodynamic path claims.

aggregation_method: MEDIAN of H_Oe over all rows in file where isfinite(H_Oe)
allowed_interpretation: Robust central tendency of recorded field for protocol labeling.
forbidden_interpretation: Absolute field accuracy; cancellation of systematic field offset errors without calibration table.

aggregation_method: MIN of H_Oe over scope
allowed_interpretation: Observed field floor in scope.
forbidden_interpretation: Field zeroing correctness without hardware audit.

aggregation_method: MAX of H_Oe over scope
allowed_interpretation: Observed field ceiling in scope.
forbidden_interpretation: Ramp-rate-induced field error claims.

aggregation_method: MAX(H_Oe)-MIN(H_Oe) over scope
allowed_interpretation: Field variability across points in scope.
forbidden_interpretation: Stability of superconducting magnet power supply beyond descriptive variability.

aggregation_method: MIN of M_emu_clean over scope
allowed_interpretation: Lower envelope of cleaned moment in scope.
forbidden_interpretation: Intrinsic magnetic response after demagnetizing-field correction.

aggregation_method: MAX of M_emu_clean over scope
allowed_interpretation: Upper envelope of cleaned moment in scope.
forbidden_interpretation: Saturation magnetization without composition and demag model.

aggregation_method: MAX(M_emu_clean)-MIN(M_emu_clean) over scope
allowed_interpretation: Total swing of cleaned moment over sampled T in scope.
forbidden_interpretation: Coercivity; remanence; phase transition amplitude.

aggregation_method: MIN of M_over_H over rows with abs(H_Oe)>H_ABS_GT_EPS_Oe and finite M_over_H
allowed_interpretation: Descriptive bound of M/H proxy where field nonzero.
forbidden_interpretation: Linear susceptibility in the thermodynamic limit; demagnetization-corrected chi.

aggregation_method: MAX of M_over_H over rows with abs(H_Oe)>H_ABS_GT_EPS_Oe and finite M_over_H
allowed_interpretation: Descriptive bound of M/H proxy where field nonzero.
forbidden_interpretation: Same as mt_M_over_H_min forbidden list.

aggregation_method: MAX(M_over_H)-MIN(M_over_H) over nonzero-field valid rows
allowed_interpretation: Spread of M/H proxy where defined.
forbidden_interpretation: Field-dependent susceptibility phase transitions; critical scaling.

aggregation_method: MAX of abs(dM_dT) over scope (finite values only)
allowed_interpretation: Largest magnitude of declared dM/dT channel in scope as a shape sharpness probe.
forbidden_interpretation: True transition sharpness; latent heat; order-parameter divergence.

aggregation_method: FWHM-like width along T of abs(dM_dT) after derivative policy specifies baseline and crossings
allowed_interpretation: Heuristic width of a single peak feature in abs(dM/dT) under fixed algorithm.
forbidden_interpretation: Correlation length; critical exponent nu; definitive transition width.

aggregation_method: Midpoint T between outer crossings at half-max of abs(dM_dT) peak per derivative policy
allowed_interpretation: Algorithmic midpoint of a peak feature in abs(dM/dT).
forbidden_interpretation: Tc; equilibrium transition temperature; comparison to literature Tc.

aggregation_method: T_K at row where abs(dM_dT) is maximal breaking ties by lowest row_index
allowed_interpretation: Temperature coordinate of steepest modeled slope in the implemented derivative sense.
forbidden_interpretation: Kramers-Kronig consistency; dynamic crossover temperature; Tc.

aggregation_method: MEDIAN(M)_ZFC minus MEDIAN(M)_FCW evaluated on common T-bin intersection per binning policy (placeholder aggregation)
allowed_interpretation: Descriptive difference of location statistics when bins overlap; protocol contrast probe.
forbidden_interpretation: Equilibrium bifurcation; supercooling; irreversibility field; any Aging or Relaxation coupling.

aggregation_method: MEDIAN(M) on increasing-T segments minus MEDIAN(M) on decreasing-T segments on overlapping T support per policy
allowed_interpretation: Descriptive contrast between opposed ramp directions on overlapping T windows.
forbidden_interpretation: True hysteresis loop area; first-order transition; metastability without field protocol audit.

aggregation_method: MIN over required segment-type pairs of overlap_length_K divided by min(span_K) for that pair
allowed_interpretation: Scalar gate-friendly overlap metric for comparing segments on temperature axis.
forbidden_interpretation: Physical equivalence of compared segments; identical thermal histories.

aggregation_method: MEAN of M_norm over rows with finite M_norm and finite positive sample_mass_g
allowed_interpretation: When unblocked by mass gate only: descriptive mass-normalized moment average in scope.
forbidden_interpretation: Specific magnetization of a pure phase; comparison to theoretical spin-only moment.

aggregation_method: MEAN of chi_mass over rows with finite chi_mass finite mass and abs(H_Oe)>H_ABS_GT_EPS_Oe
allowed_interpretation: When unblocked only: descriptive average of declared mass-normalized susceptibility proxy.
forbidden_interpretation: Linear response susceptibility including demagnetization correction; critical exponent gamma.
